issues.title: Checkout errors causing order abandonment
issues.description: 5 session(s) hit an error on /checkout and never completed their order. Users either cancelled or dropped silently.
issues.recommendation: Investigate what triggers div.error-message at checkout. likely a payment validation or address validation failure. Add clearer error messages and inline field validation.

issues.title: Sessions landing directly on /checkout without browsing
issues.description: 2 session(s) started at /checkout - likely broken bookmarks, email links, or redirects. Both hit an error immediately.
issues.recommendation: Guard /checkout entry: if cart is empty, redirect to / with a friendly message. Audit any external links pointing to /checkout.

issues.title: FAQ answers fail to load
issues.description: 2 session(s) clicked a FAQ question and immediately got an error message. The FAQ content is not rendering.
issues.recommendation: Check the FAQ answer fetch - likely a broken API call or missing content in the CMS.

issues.title: Language switching triggers errors on /settings
issues.description: 1 session(s) changed language and encountered an error. Languages affected: ['Russian'].
issues.recommendation: The language preference save is failing - check the settings PUT endpoint and whether all locale codes are supported.

issues.title: /random page causing user confusion
issues.description: 1 session(s) on /random showed clear confusion signals (searches for '???' and 'confused', error messages). The page purpose is unclear or broken.
issues.recommendation: Either clarify the purpose of /random with better UX copy, or redirect it to a valid page if it's a dead route.

behaviors.title: Users buying despite leaving negative product feedback
behaviors.description: 2 session(s) left a negative comment on a product page yet completed their purchase. These comments are live friction signals.
behaviors.insight: The textarea.comment on product pages is capturing real-time sentiment. Consider surfacing these as a CS alert or feeding them into product reviews.

behaviors.title: Items added to cart but session ends with logout
behaviors.description: 3 session(s) added items to cart but logged out without purchasing. Potential cart abandonment worth following up via email.
behaviors.insight: If cart state persists after logout, a cart recovery email flow could convert these sessions.

behaviors.title: International users: higher engagement but language friction
behaviors.description: 5 user(s) changed their language during the session. Their checkout conversion rate: 46.2% vs 35.3% for non-switchers.
behaviors.insight: Language-switching users are highly engaged (they invest time in setup) but face technical friction on /settings. Fixing the language save bug could directly improve international conversion.

behaviors.title: /random page used as an alternative search entry point
behaviors.description: 1 session(s) used the search bar on /random to find products: ['headset'].
behaviors.insight: Some users discover /random and use it to navigate. If it has a functional search bar, consider making it a proper discovery/exploration page rather than leaving it undefined.

behaviors.title: Product comments left by non-buyers
behaviors.description: 9 comment(s) left on product pages by users who never completed a purchase. These reviews mix with buyer feedback.
behaviors.insight: Non-buyer comments are displayed alongside verified purchase reviews, weakening social proof. Consider restricting textarea.comment to verified buyers, or adding a 'verified purchase' badge to differentiate.
